channel.title: Г“mega on Artiom Kovnatsky: Portfolio & Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Г“mega on Artiom Kovnatsky: Portfolio & Blog

item.title: Philosophie | ОҰО№О»ОҝПғОҝПҶОҜОұ | Philosophy
item.description: Hinterlasse alles, mindestens, nicht schlechter als es vor dir war. Werte Den Lehren Christi folgen (Glaube an Gott) вҖ” nicht in der Form, sondern im Wesen Mut und Tapferkeit Gegenseitig vorteilhafte AnsГӨtze Mein Ziel ist es, вҖһPunkte des stabilen Gleichgewichts in SystemenвҖң zu finden und umzusetzen. Gegenseitig vorteilhafte LГ¶sungen sichern langfristige StabilitГӨt und vermeiden Ungleichgewichte. Praktische Anwendbarkeit Ich bevorzuge LГ¶sungen, die in der Praxis funktionieren, aber ich schГӨtze auch schГ¶ne Theorie.

item.title: #0: A Metaphorical Autobiography, or the ProfessorвҖҷs Bunker Stories
item.description: Part 1 About the soul. A person is usually made up of sub-personalities that inhabit a metaphorical little town. In my town there is a Professor. The townspeople themselves gave him that titleвҖ”an unimpeachable authority, always calm and impartial. A single gesture from him was enough to stop any conflict. He knew what to do… in war and in famine. He appeared quietly when needed and disappeared just as quietly when the war and hunger ended… in June 2019.

item.title: #1: The Boat, Kandinsky 7.0 and ChatGPT 42.0, or ValueвҖ“Meaning Journeys
item.description: Truth, once expressed in form (written, spoken, etc.), ceases to be truth вҖ” including what I write... the usual exceptions are metaphors, parables, fairy tales, proverbs... music. After reading this training article, the reader will: do some mental gymnastics which may, perhaps, increase awareness and thereby bring more freedom to oneвҖҷs thinking and, as a result, to oneвҖҷs life; itвҖҷs worth periodically rereading this training article, taking notes, trying to grasp the meanings laid out and the links between them.

item.title: #7: РһРұСҖР°Р· РұСғРҙСғСүРөРіРҫ РёР»Рё РҝСғСӮРөСҲРөСҒСӮРІРёРө РҗРҪРҙСҖРөСҸ СҒ РІРҫР»СҲРөРұРҪСӢРј РәР»СғРұРәРҫРј Р‘Р°РұСӢ РҜРіРё
item.description: [WIP] | [In Progress] *Using Russia as an example вҖңVecheismвҖқ Every resident of Russia should benefit from the countryвҖҷs resources (not just the вҖң1%вҖқ). The ideas of вҖңdemocracy and freedomвҖқ are powerful, but they can be used as cover. A real alternative can be justice, brotherhood, and family values. What follows builds on these principles. Goal: Justice, brotherhood and family values вңЁрҹӨқ We are a вҖңfamilyвҖқ рҹҸЎрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ Possible roles and participation structure in shared projects/companies:

item.title: О©. Taking Stock and the "Conscious Madness" Journey
item.description: О©. Taking stock of a life stage. I searched for answers to вҖңwhy all this?вҖқ and вҖңhow to find inner joy and peace?вҖқ. I tried every external source availableвҖ”from society, spiritual practices, and science to cultures, religions, books, and films. None fit. I found my own path. It isnвҖҷt new, but I hope the way I present it will be clear. If notвҖ”ask me (contacts below). To clarify вҖңmy coordinatesвҖқ and the path to my current state, IвҖҷll briefly lay out my story.
